name: Ring Announcer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>選</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>入</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>場</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アナウンス
desc:
(This card is always treated as a "Battlin' Boxing" card.)
Special Summon 1 "Battlin' Boxer" monster from your hand, then you can destroy Spells/Traps on the field, up to the number of Xyz Monsters you control. You can only activate 1 "Ring Announcer" per turn.
eff:

misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
